scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3003 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($pids) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Stopped process(es) on port 3003.' } else { Write-Host 'No process found on port 3003.' }"
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev
scripts.dev: set PORT=3003&& set APP_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3200&& set API_PREFIX=api&& set IMPORT_STORAGE_DIR=storage/imports&& tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/main.js
